title: main 4-key easy reference chart
purpose: Easier 4-key reference chart for checking basic timing, readability, hold feel, and gentle density curves.
patternDesign: Deterministic Easy loops with wider spacing, mostly single notes, limited holds, and only a few readable D+J/F+K chord accents in build/highlight.

sections.name: calm intro
sections.intent: Easy onboarding with very wide spacing and single-note reads
sections.patternIntent: Easy onboarding with very wide spacing and single-note reads

sections.name: easy verse
sections.intent: Quarter-note loops that introduce D F J K and K J F D without pressure
sections.patternIntent: Quarter-note loops that introduce D F J K and K J F D without pressure

sections.name: build up
sections.intent: Slightly more active but still mostly single notes with one clear chord accent
sections.patternIntent: Slightly more active but still mostly single notes with one clear chord accent

sections.name: highlight
sections.intent: Easy peak density with predictable loops and limited D+J/F+K chords
sections.patternIntent: Easy peak density with predictable loops and limited D+J/F+K chords

sections.name: steady drive
sections.intent: Recovery groove with fewer notes and familiar fragments
sections.patternIntent: Recovery groove with fewer notes and familiar fragments

sections.name: release
sections.intent: Cooldown with long gaps and simple hold checks
sections.patternIntent: Cooldown with long gaps and simple hold checks

sections.name: outro
sections.intent: Short ending cadence for final timing confirmation
sections.patternIntent: Short ending cadence for final timing confirmation

easy_calm_A.description: Very sparse D to J call for first-read timing.

easy_calm_B.description: Wide-gap inner-lane notes with one simple hold.

easy_verse_A.description: Plain D F J K quarter-note loop.

easy_verse_B.description: Plain K J F D quarter-note reverse loop.

easy_verse_hold.description: Short hold with two spacious follow-up taps.

easy_build_A.description: Light build-up with one 8th-note pair and readable right answer.

easy_build_B.description: Reverse light build-up with one 8th-note pair.

easy_build_chord.description: First easy 2-key accent after single-note setup.

easy_high_A.description: Easy highlight density using DFJK plus one readable chord.

easy_high_B.description: Easy highlight reverse density with F+K accent.

easy_high_hold.description: Highlight hold phrase without extra chord pressure.

easy_drive_A.description: Post-highlight recovery using familiar DFJK fragments.
